tasks.name: Implement short URL creation
tasks.description: Implement the create-short-url endpoint that generates a unique slug and stores the mapping.
tasks.component_responsibility: Create a short URL from a long URL

completion_criteria.description: POST /shorten returns a 6-char slug and persists the mapping

tasks.name: Implement abuse notification email dispatch
tasks.description: Implement the email-send function that notifies the administrator within 2 minutes of an abuse flag.
tasks.component_responsibility: Send email to administrator within 2 min of abuse flag

completion_criteria.description: An abuse flag triggers an email sent to the configured administrator address
